---
title: Formula option gate extension test
author: Dongyu Zhao
version: 0.1
date: '2026-06-30'
license: '[CC-BY-SA 4.0](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/)'
...

## Formula option gates

These examples attach the formula extension without enabling dollar formula
delimiters. Dollar-delimited syntax remains ordinary Markdown.

```````````````````````````````` example
Inline $x+y$ end.
.
Document scope=1:1..1:17 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:17 children=1
    └── Text scope=1:1..1:17 literal="Inline $x+y$ end." children=0
````````````````````````````````

```````````````````````````````` example
$$
x+y
$$
.
Document scope=1:1..3:2 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..3:2 children=5
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:2 literal="$$" children=0
    ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
    ├── Text scope=2:1..2:3 literal="x+y" children=0
    ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
    └── Text scope=3:1..3:2 literal="$$" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Formula fenced-code blocks remain enabled by the formula extension.

```````````````````````````````` example
```formula
x+y
```
.
Document scope=1:1..3:3 children=1
└── FormulaBlock scope=1:1..3:3 mode=standalone literal="x+y" children=0
````````````````````````````````
